case_title: MANOR INVESTMENT INC DBA C&C CHECK CASHING CO. VS CITY AND COUNTY OF SF CITY ATTORNEYS OFFICE

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $170.50 FILED BY MANOR INVESTMENT INC DBA C&C CHECK CASHING CO. AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SF CITY ATTORNEYS OFFICE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-14-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MANOR INVESTMENT INC DBA C&C CHECK CASHING CO. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SF CITY ATTORNEYS OFFICE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SF CITY ATTORNEYS OFFICE
